title: Moderation update: spam & harassment enforcement
body:
Today we processed several high-severity abuse reports.

- User 'spam_wave_42' has been permanently banned for high-volume phishing spam across multiple channels.
- User 'toxic_runner' has received a formal warning for targeted harassment of newcomers; any further incidents may result in a ban.
- Reports against a core_maintainer were reviewed and closed as false positives triggered by brigading; no action was taken against the maintainer.

We remain committed to keeping this community safe from spam and harassment while protecting trusted contributors from bad-faith reporting.
